<!-- Lakme Academy Website Project -->

# Lakme Academy Website Development

This workspace contains the Lakme Academy website built with HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript.

## Project Structure
- **index.html** - Main landing page
- **css/** - Stylesheets for responsive design
  - style.css - Main stylesheet with all component styles
  - responsive.css - Mobile-first responsive design
- **js/** - JavaScript functionality
  - script.js - Interactive features and form handling
- **pages/** - Individual course pages
  - hairstyling.html - Hairstyling course details
  - cosmetology.html - Cosmetology course details
  - makeup.html - Makeup artistry course details
  - skincare.html - Skincare course details
- **images/** - Images and assets
- **README.md** - Complete project documentation

## Development Guidelines
- Use semantic HTML5
- Implement mobile-first responsive design
- Follow clean code practices
- Include accessibility features (ARIA labels, semantic tags)
- Use CSS Grid and Flexbox for layouts
- Vanilla JavaScript for interactivity

## ✅ Completed Steps
- [x] Project Structure Created
- [x] Main HTML Files Created (index.html)
- [x] Styling Implemented (CSS with responsive design)
- [x] JavaScript Functionality Added
- [x] Course Pages Created (4 course pages)

## Features Implemented
✓ Responsive Navigation with Mobile Menu
✓ Hero Section with Call-to-Action
✓ Course Grid with 4 Courses
✓ About Section with Statistics
✓ Contact Form with Validation
✓ Footer with Links
✓ Smooth Scrolling & Animations
✓ Mobile-First Design (Mobile, Tablet, Desktop)
✓ Accessibility Features
✓ Individual Course Pages with Curriculum

2. Replace placeholder contact information
3. Test on various devices and browsers
4. Deploy to hosting service

## Tech Stack
- **Frontend**: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (Vanilla)
- **Responsive**: CSS Media Queries, Flexbox, CSS Grid
- **Accessibility**: ARIA labels, Semantic HTML
- **Performance**: Optimized for fast loading

## Browser Support
- Chrome (Latest)
- Firefox (Latest)
- Safari (Latest)
- Edge (Latest)
- Mobile browsers
